name: reg_mux
title: Reg Mux
description: A width-parameterized register that selects between two inputs, with a configurable reset value.

name: priority_encoder_case
title: Priority Encoder Case
description: A parameterized, lowest-request-first encoder implemented as an explicit case statement for widths up to 32.

name: priority_encoder_for
title: Priority Encoder For
description: A width-parameterized, lowest-request-first encoder implemented with a procedural loop.

name: priority_encoder_carry
title: Priority Encoder Carry
description: A width-parameterized encoder that isolates the lowest request with a carry-chain-friendly arithmetic expression.

name: adder_chain
title: Adder Chain
description: A width- and input-count-parameterized combinational sum over N packed input values.

name: barrel_shifter
title: Barrel Shifter
description: A width-parameterized bidirectional barrel shifter with logical and arithmetic right-shift modes.

name: round_robin_arbiter
title: Round-Robin Arbiter
description: A requester-count-parameterized arbiter that rotates priority after each accepted grant.

name: pipe
title: Register Pipe
description: A width- and stage-count-parameterized register pipeline with clock enable, configurable reset value, and zero-stage bypass.

name: srl_pipe
title: SRL Pipe
description: A width- and stage-count-parameterized enabled pipeline written to infer FPGA shift-register resources, with zero-stage bypass.

name: fifo_pipe
title: FIFO Pipe
description: A width- and stage-count-parameterized ready/valid elastic pipeline with backpressure and zero-stage pass-through.

name: inferred_fifo
title: Inferred FIFO
description: A data-width- and depth-parameterized single-clock FIFO backed by an inferred memory array and read/write pointers.

name: async_fifo_blackbox
title: Async FIFO IP Wrapper
description: A parameterized ready/valid wrapper around a blackboxed dual-clock FIFO, representative of vendor-generated CDC IP.

name: handshake_controller
title: Handshake Controller
description: A timeout-parameterized request/response controller with ready/valid handshakes and explicit completion status.

name: counter
title: Counter
description: A width-parameterized enabled counter using a shared increment helper.
